creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #6)

No,

In order to take maintainership, please attach a patch updating just the MANTAINER line. It has to be assigned to the port maintainer. If the maintainer doesn't reject it  in 14 days, you will become a maintainer.

Please create a new bug for this, subject should begin with "x11-wm/windowmaker:"

Yuri
